title: 10 years of AlphaGo: The turning point for AI | Thore Graepel & Pushmeet Kohli
summary: A 10-year retrospective on AlphaGo's 2016 victory over Lee Sedol at Go, presented by Google DeepMind researchers. The discussion frames this match as a pivotal moment that catalyzed the modern AI revolution, leading to subsequent breakthroughs in algorithmic discovery and scientific challenges like protein folding.
